examples: The snob appeal may strengthen should the CPA persuade the European Union to afford pasties the “protected geographical status” enjoyed by, for example, Gorgonzola cheese and Prosciutto ham.
You come here for Gorgonzola-crusted, bone-in buffalo rib eye or red-wine-braised Montana lamb shank.
Try the roasted butternut squash soup with spicy pumpkin seeds, and the creamy polenta with mascarpone, walnuts and gorgonzola.
The duck breast with nectarines is a local favourite, and the chorizo- and gorgonzola-stuffed dates will bring a tear to your eye.
